Suna (by Kortix) is the free, open-source alternative to Manus AI and Genspark for AI-powered website creation, competitor analysis, research, game development, and much more. This video compares both tools head-to-head with a simple demo, and give you step by step tutorial on how to self-host Suna locally with an Anthropic, Daytona, Firecrawl, and Tavli API keys. results.title: Best Manus AI Alternative: Secure AI Agents for Enterprises
results.content:
## Looking for the Best Manus AI Alternative in 2026?

If you need AI that is reliable, structured, and built around your own data, Knolli is the best Manus AI alternative in 2026. It focuses on turning knowledge into usable workflows rather than acting as a general-purpose autonomous agent.

This difference becomes clear when you look at how people compare tools today. Platforms like Manus AI, OpenClaw, ZeroClaw, and CrewAI are all solving different parts of the same problem. They focus on execution, automation, or agent behavior.

Knolli takes a different approach. It focuses on knowledge-driven AI systems that work consistently inside real business workflows.

Manus AI is an autonomous AI agent built to complete tasks, take action in a browser, and return finished work rather than just giving answers. Its official product pages describe it as an action engine and a virtual colleague that can plan, execute, and deliver results across workflows. [...] At the same time, what Manus offers is broad by design. It is trying to be a general-purpose AI worker. That broad scope is useful for experimentation, personal productivity, and open-ended tasks. It can also create friction for teams that need fixed workflows, control over private knowledge, and repeatable answers built around company documents rather than agent behavior.

## What Is Knolli, How Does It Work & Why Is It the Best Manus AI Alternative?

Knolli is a no-code AI copilot platform that turns your content, documents, and knowledge into a working AI system capable of answering questions, assisting, and executing tasks. It is built for creators, teams, and businesses that want AI outputs based on their own data instead of generic responses.

results.title: 6 Best Manus AI Alternatives [Tested and Compared for 2026] | Lindy
results.content:
## My verdict

If you're only using Manus for slide generation, most of the tools above will serve you better, especially ones like Gamma, SlideSpeak, or Beautiful.ai. These are purpose-built for presentations.

Lindy is the strongest alternative if you’re using Manus to handle email, update CRMs, or manage multi-step tasks. It’s the only tool in this list that replaces the agent logic part of Manus, not just the output.

Saner.AI suits research-heavy users and their workflows the best. It’s not a Manus replacement, but a great companion for the early stages of content creation.

Here’s how I’d summarize my test results: [...] Here’s how I’d summarize my test results:

 Use Lindy if you want an agent-based automation platform.
 Use Decktopus or Gamma, if all you need is great-looking presentations.
 Use Saner.AI if your bottleneck is organizing messy input, not output.

## Try Lindy, the Manus AI alternative that simplifies workflow automation

Lindy is an AI automation tool and a worthy alternative to Manus AI. It lets you create custom AI agents for meetings, emails, support, and sales tasks.

Lindy stands out among Manus AI alternatives for three key reasons:

 Drag-and-drop workflow builder for non-coders: You don’t need any technical skills to build workflows with Lindy. It offers a drag-and-drop visual workflow builder. [...] ### Is there a free alternative to Manus AI?

Yes, Lindy, Saner.AI, SlideSpeak, and Gamma are some free alternatives to Manus AI. Lindy, for example, gives you up to 40 free tasks/month.

### Which Manus AI competitor has the best design tools?

Beautiful.ai has the best design tools. Its smart templates and auto-layout engine make it easy to create clean, polished decks without a designer.

### What is similar to the Manus app?

Lindy is similar to the Manus app. However, Lindy is much more capable of handling complex everyday tasks because of its visual workflow builder, 4,000+ integrations, and ready-to-use AI agent templates.

### Can I use Lindy.ai instead of Manus AI?

results.title: Manus Alternatives: We tested the best 6 in 2026
results.content:
## FAQ: Manus Alternative

1. What is a Manus Alternative?

A _Manus Alternative_ is any AI agent or assistant that can plan, reason, and complete real-world tasks - without you micromanaging every step. While Manus.im is known for its hands-off, autonomous approach, it’s still invite-only and limited for many users.

  

2. Why are people looking for Manus alternatives?

Many users love the idea of autonomous AI agents - but Manus is hard to access, tricky to fine-tune, and not always reliable out of the box.

Alternatives like Saner.AI offer a more _practical starting point_ for:

   Managing real to-dos from messy notes
   Auto-scheduling focus blocks
   Following through on projects
   Reducing decision fatigue with smart nudges

  

3. Which AI agent is best for daily work planning? [...] ### 1. Claude

Image 5: Claude
Claude, developed by Anthropic, has evolved into a premier "agentic" AI assistantthat serves as a powerful alternative to Manus AI. While Manus focuses on high-level task automation, Claude excels by blending S-tier reasoning with the ability to execute tasks directly on your computer or within a dedicated workspace.

Key feature [...] Suitable for:

   Freelancers, marketers, content creators, and small teams looking for a creative AI assistant that can generate fast, polished outputs without the complexity of full-blown agent setups.

How to start:

   Just go to genspark.ai, create a free account, and start building your first Sparkpage or content block in minutes.

### 4. Lindy.AI

Image 12: Lindy AI
Lindy.AI is a premier no-code AI agent platform designed to automate complex, multi-step business workflows that traditional tools can't handle. In 2026, it has surged in popularity as the go-to Manus alternative because, while Manus focuses on general task execution, Lindy excels at deep integration into your professional ecosystem—managing inboxes, syncing CRMs, and even handling live voice calls.

Key features
